expectations.text: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
expectations.evidence: Single dashboard.html, Chart.js via CDN only.

expectations.text: Includes KPI cards for Total Sales and Customers
Includes a visual showing progress toward the $16,000 sales goal (progress bar or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: DASHBOARD_DATA.progress has 'Progress to Sales Goal ($15,880 of $16,000)' at 99%.

expectations.text: Includes a category breakdown chart (e.g. doughnut or bar) across the 4 product categories
expectations.evidence: charts[0] doughnut chart, 4 labels matching the 4 source categories (Soy Candle, Wax Melts, Diffusers, Gift Sets).

expectations.text: Includes a per-store table or chart with all 4 stores, flagging Airport Kiosk as At Risk / underperforming
expectations.evidence: charts[1] bar chart of 4 stores plus tables[0] 'Store Performance' table with status pills; Airport Kiosk flagged At Risk in both.

expectations.text: Numeric values (sales, goal) are human-formatted with currency symbols
expectations.evidence: Values shown as '$15,880', '$16,000' with currency formatting throughout.
